summary: VenuLoQ PWA Push Notifications, Collections Cleanup, and Landing Page Header Refactor - ALL TESTS PASSED. Tested: (1) All 4 push notification API endpoints (vapid-public-key, subscribe, unsubscribe, test), (2) Collections route correctly returns 404 (removed), (3) Desktop header auth states with profile dropdown, (4) Mobile header auth states with hamburger menu, (5) Sign Out functionality, (6) Service worker push handlers.

tests.test: GET /api/push/vapid-public-key returns valid VAPID key (no auth)
POST /api/push/subscribe requires auth (401)
POST /api/push/subscribe with auth stores subscription
POST /api/push/test requires auth (401)
POST /api/push/test with auth returns success with sent count
DELETE /api/push/unsubscribe requires auth (401)
DELETE /api/push/unsubscribe with auth removes subscription
GET /api/collections returns 404
GET /api/collections/{id} returns 404
GET /sw.js returns service worker file
Service worker has push event listener
Service worker has notificationclick listener
Sign In button visible (data-testid=login-btn)
Get Started button visible (data-testid=get-started-btn)
Profile toggle hidden when not logged in
Profile toggle visible with gold avatar and user name (data-testid=desktop-profile-toggle)
Sign In button hidden when logged in
Get Started button hidden when logged in
Profile dropdown appears on click (data-testid=desktop-profile-dropdown)
Dropdown shows Favourites link
Dropdown shows My Enquiries link
Dropdown shows Profile link
Dropdown shows Sign Out link
Sign In button visible (data-testid=mobile-signin-btn)
Welcome message hidden when not logged in
Hamburger menu shows Get Started button
Hamburger menu does NOT show Sign Out
Welcome message shows 'Welcome, Demo' (data-testid=mobile-welcome-landing)
Sign In button hidden when logged in
Hamburger menu shows user info (name and email)
Hamburger menu shows My Favourites link
Hamburger menu shows My Enquiries link
Hamburger menu shows Profile link
Hamburger menu shows Sign Out link
Get Started button NOT present when logged in
Sign Out button clickable in desktop dropdown
After Sign Out, Sign In button appears
After Sign Out, profile toggle is hidden
After Sign Out, token cleared from localStorage

context_for_next_testing_agent: Push notification APIs fully tested: vapid-public-key (public), subscribe/unsubscribe/test (require Bearer auth). Collections route confirmed removed (404). Landing page headers tested for both desktop (1920px) and mobile (390px) viewports. Key data-testids: desktop-profile-toggle, desktop-profile-dropdown, login-btn, get-started-btn, mobile-welcome-landing, mobile-signin-btn, mobile-menu-toggle. Auth flow: POST /api/auth/login, set localStorage 'token' and 'user', reload page. Splash screen ~5-6 seconds.
